parsed_output.justification: Justin identifies himself as the Seer and finds no Werewolf cards in the center, indicating that any Werewolves must reside among the players. Paul claims he starts as an Insomniac, a non‑werewolf role. The only player who can plausibly end up with a Werewolf card after the night is the Robber, Mitchell, who reports stealing a card from Paul and thereby may have swapped his own card for a Werewolf from the center. All other accounts—Justin’s confirmation of Seer and Paul’s admission of being an Insomniac—eliminate them from being the final werewolf. Accordingly, Mitchell is the most likely candidate.
